alternatives: The PR author or maintainer should manually merge main into the PR branch and regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml following the conflict guide.
reason: Tool cannot push to branches with '@' characters (e.g., sdkauto/@azure-arm-servicefabric-6101245). The merge commit was prepared locally but cannot be pushed automatically.

body:
No API design issues found in this PR. The `@azure/arm-servicefabric` 4.0.0-beta.1 TypeSpec migration looks clean:

- **CHANGELOG** correctly compares with 3.0.0 (prior stable version) ✅
- **package.json** version matches `4.0.0-beta.1` ✅
- **User agent** in `serviceFabricManagementContext.ts` matches `azsdk-js-arm-servicefabric/4.0.0-beta.1` ✅
- **KnownVersions** enum includes both API versions (`2023-11-01-preview`, `2026-03-01-preview`) ✅
- No `_N`-suffixed or `AutoGenerated`-prefixed type names found ✅

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: merge conflict in `pnpm-lock.yaml` (`mergeable_state: dirty`). Auto-fix was prepared locally but could not be pushed — the branch name `sdkauto/@azure-arm-servicefabric-6101245` contains `@` which the auto-push tool does not support. Please follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to fix this manually.
